Book an Appointment [caldera_form id=”CF5f4360b3e1c1f”] Testimonials Our Clients Say Sahera Banu Ahmad Curaden dental clinic is one of the best dental clinic I have seen so far in Bangalore. I’ve been to many clinics but never felt this much of comfort and satisfaction anywhere. The phobia of visiting a dentist is disappeared.Specially Dr.Kavitha Chandramouli is excel in perfection as well as having great skill and I really appreciate the way she is doing my treatment of Orthodontics Be it the doctors, their assistants or the admin staff they’re all very nice and humble. During covid19 pandemic I visited the clinic without fear because they are following all the guidelines to prevent any infection. adngalaxy Really professional place. The doctor over here saved one of my tooth and helped me avoid a dreadful root canal. While Dentists at a certain other clinic were suggesting I wait four weeks to see if the cavity expands, the doctor here operate immediately and found out I was really close to infecting my tooth nerves, hence saving me a root canal. Definitely recommended. Anil Gudigar one of best place for dental issues. my consultation with Dr. Ganesh is every time is better and treatment is really good. Asha Shridhar A very clean and hygienic environment. The Doctor’s and staff are kind, pleasant and helpful. I strongly recommend Curaden for all dental needs. Sai Subramanyam Top notch clinic, refranchised from the previous Swiss Smile brand, the care and quality fall nothing short of in any manner. The doctors provide utmost specialised personal attention to every patient and I have got a couple of family members treated by them. Being a health-care professional myself, I highly recommend this clinic for exclusive dental care. kuldeep singh Best Doctors at this Clinic, by all the Doctors there. Genuine cost and No Overbillng to meet Sales Targets. Have been going there for Past 8 yrs after burning hands elsewhere. Arun Kumar These Doctors are really good. I had an issue for 6 years and all other so called dentists in India and abroad had failed miserably and Doctors in Swiss smile fixed it. I strongly recommend this facility. Bhavna Kumar Dr Kavitha is just awesome with children. She took my child through an 18 month long orthodontic treatment that began with 4 extractions! She is very empathetic and knows how to alleviate fears that children have for dental procedures. I would highly recommend her. chethana chethan My experience with Swiss Smile was great . I had a bad experience with my previous dentist . Here doctors are very good and thorough professionals . Clinic is very clean and sterilization of high standards . H K I came here in 2012..a condition i was suffering with,was diagnosed by dr ganesh.since then its my 2nd home..excellent care,immaculate cleanliness .staff is like family..u feel like ur abroad..no one could understand,help and treat my complicated issues like dr ganesh ..its not just about trusting my 32 but my life in their hands..if i had to move town,id carry curaden with me or stay put just for this one reason…😊😊 Suzee Shree Curaden is one of the best clinic, no pain procedures, very strict on hygiene protocol followed starting from clinical entry to exit. very friendly staff from admin to hygienist. Very well maintained, clean and aesthetically well planned infrastructure. I visited clinic for my nephew’s treatment and its was all done in very planned and standard procedure. would like to recommend this clinic for all. monisha gowda It was a wonderful experience at Curaden dental clinic…Dr. Kavitha n other staff was so friendly n caring while doing the procedure…I will definitely suggest others visit Curaden.
